chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-149 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.10.2024 Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah advocate for applicants. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur APG. -.-.-. Counsel for the applicants under the instructions does not press instant revision application, same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. J U D G E Ali Haider
